what: Re-measured lift of the opt-in UniMorph paradigm backend (use_paradigms) on the offline NT lemma protocol, after the honesty guards and the gender-corrected v2 asset.
protocol: no other backends active; greek.lemmatize per token via evaluate_on_nt scoring (the registry offline_nt_lemma protocol) with use_paradigms() toggled; asset grc-paradigms-v2 fetched sha-verified
supersedes: paradigms-lift-2026-07-11.json (the pre-guard measurement: with_paradigms 0.7196 with 742 paradigm-sourced wrong lemmas served as grounded)

guards.capitalized_surface: the paradigm tier is skipped for capitalized surfaces (the table is lowercase common vocabulary; the rule layer preserves surface capitalization)
guards.intra_table_ambiguity: a form mapping to more than one distinct lemma in the table returns no pick (honest miss over an arbitrary first-entry choice)
guards.rule_first_ordering: the paradigm tier is consulted only where the guarded ending rules do not recover, so the nominal table cannot shadow the thematic-verb readings
guards.evidence_class: paradigm hits report LemmaSource.PARADIGM (previously folded into SEED)

results.pre_guard_comparison: the shipped 0.37.0 behavior measured 0.7196 but served 742 paradigm-sourced wrong lemmas as grounded no-review answers (420 newly wrong vs baseline); the guards trade 0.75 accuracy points for removing 524 of those confidently-wrong lemmas and cutting newly-wrong from 420 to 10

asset.name: grc-paradigms
asset.source: UniMorph grc, CC BY-SA 3.0, commit 7f4a58df733726c75c1355dd3a038e950d5e308f; gender cells cross-checked against the AGDT treebank lexicon (Perseus commit pinned in greek/treebank.py) plus a curated feminine second-declension list (Smyth 230 N.)
